proof: function(x0: List[Pair[Nat, Nat]], x1: Nat) { List.nil[Pair[Nat, Nat]] != x0 or satisfies_all(x1, x0) }(List.nil[Pair[Nat, Nat]], c)

function(x0: Pair[Nat, Nat], x1: List[Pair[Nat, Nat]], x2: List[Pair[Nat, Nat]], x3: Nat) { List.cons(x0, x1) != x2 or not satisfies_all(x3, x2) or x3.congr_mod(x0.second, x0.first) }(head, tail, List.cons(head, tail), c)

function(x0: Pair[Nat, Nat], x1: List[Pair[Nat, Nat]], x2: List[Pair[Nat, Nat]], x3: Nat) { List.cons(x0, x1) != x2 or not satisfies_all(x3, x2) or satisfies_all(x3, x1) }(head, tail, List.cons(head, tail), c)

function(x0: Nat, x1: Pair[Nat, Nat], x2: List[Pair[Nat, Nat]], x3: List[Pair[Nat, Nat]]) { not x0.congr_mod(x1.second, x1.first) or List.cons(x1, x2) != x3 or not satisfies_all(x0, x2) or satisfies_all(x0, x3) }(c, head, tail, List.cons(head, tail))
function(x0: Nat) { not satisfies_all(x0, List.nil[Pair[Nat, Nat]]) }(Nat.zero)

function(x0: List[Pair[Nat, Nat]]) { product[Nat](system_moduli(x0)) = system_modulus(x0) }(List.nil[Pair[Nat, Nat]])

function(x0: Pair[Nat, Nat], x1: List[Pair[Nat, Nat]], x2: List[Pair[Nat, Nat]]) { List.cons(x0, x1) != x2 or List.cons(x0.first, system_moduli(x1)) = system_moduli(x2) }(head, tail, List.cons(head, tail))
function[T0: lib(comm_monoid).CommMonoid](x0: T0, x1: List[T0]) { x0 * product[T0](x1) = product[T0](List.cons[T0](x0, x1)) }[Nat](head.first, system_moduli(tail))
function[T0: lib(comm_monoid).CommMonoid](x0: T0, x1: List[T0]) { x0 * product[T0](x1) = product[T0](List.cons[T0](x0, x1)) }[Nat](head.first, system_moduli(tail))
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { x0 * x1 = x0 * x1 }(head.first, system_modulus(tail))
